title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
